AlertedRange.Description: A range within which the player can be seen/sensed when the NPC is alerted to their presence

GreetRange.Description: The range at which Kweebecs will greet nearby (non-hostile) targets

WatchRange.Description: The range at which Kweebecs will look at nearby (non-hostile) targets

FlockArray.Description: Array containing NPCs for this flock type

IsMemory.Description: Defines if the NPC is a memory

MemoriesCategory.Description: Defines the category of the memory

MemoriesNameOverride.Description: Overrides the memory name if set

NameTranslationKey.Description: Translation key for NPC name display

FairyFollowRange.Description: Maximum range the fairy follow while being tempted by food.

FairyThinkParticleOffset.Description: The offset for fairy think bubbles.

FairyFood.Description: The kind of food fairies like.

FairyMaxPlayerFollowDistance.Description: The maximum distance a fairy will follow its recruiter before it gives up.

FairyHomeRadius.Description: How large the home radius of a fairy is. It's hardcoded to 30; for now.

RecruitedAppearance.Description: The appearance to use when recruited.

OriginalAppearance.Description: The appearance to use when wild.

FairyCanFarm.Description: If true this fairy can farm in the home area.

FairyHarvestingLongRange.Description: The short range which a fairy can harvest plant blocks in.

FairyHarvestingRange.Description: The short range which a fairy can harvest plant blocks in.

FairyCanMine.Description: If true this fairy can mine nearby valuable blocks.

FairyCanSort.Description: If true this fairy can sort items in the home area.
